title: PatchTST Post-Training Eval & Backtest
_notes: accelerator=none: this notebook never trains — CPU is sufficient.
To run as a standalone eval kernel (separate from training), you must make the
saved model files available. Two options:
A) Run this notebook appended to the training kernel session (SAVE_DIR=/kaggle/working/save_dir).
B) Upload the save_dir/patchtst_cls_sector_all_11_sectors/ folder as a Kaggle dataset,
add it to dataset_sources, and update SAVE_DIR in Section 0 of the notebook to
